nasb.text: When they measured it with an omer, he who had gathered much had no excess, and he who had gathered little had no lack; every man gathered as much as he should eat.

esv.text: But when they measured it with an omer, whoever gathered much had nothing left over, and whoever gathered little had no lack. Each of them gathered as much as he could eat.

cnv.text: 他們用升斗衡量的時候，多收的沒有剩餘，少收的也不缺乏；各人按著自己的食量收取。

ccb.text: 后来，他们用俄梅珥量的时候，就发现多拾的没有剩余，少拾的也没有缺乏，刚好是每人所需要的量。
